data.title: Visual Storytelling
data.description: Core focus on visual content sharing through images and videos.
data.technical_spec: Prioritizes photo filters, stories, and reels as main content types.

data.title: Community Engagement
data.description: Encourages user interaction and connection through features like comments and DMs.
data.technical_spec: Algorithms prioritize content from known connections in the feed.

data.title: Innovation
data.description: Continual introduction of new features to enhance user experience.
data.technical_spec: Regular updates and rollouts of features like Reels and Shop.

data.title: Influencer Culture
data.description: Stronghold in influencer marketing and brand collaborations.
data.technical_spec: Supports brand partnerships with tools for sponsored content and shopping features.

data.title: Privacy Focus
data.description: Emphasizes user data privacy and control over shared content.
data.technical_spec: Clear privacy settings and user data management options.
